name: Neon
description: Guarded Neon platform operations for projects, branches, connection URI retrieval, and MCP config generation.

secrets.name: NEON_API_KEY
secrets.label: Neon API Key
secrets.description: API key from the Neon Console. Store in RUDI secrets; do not commit connection strings.

secrets.name: NEON_API_BASE_URL
secrets.label: Neon API Base URL
secrets.description: Optional Neon API base URL. Defaults to https://console.neon.tech/api/v2.
